Graph.description: The central semantic network. Stores nodes and edges in memory. Source of truth for structural relationships.
critical_rules: Cannot be directly modified during query execution. Built entirely by Connectors.

Node.description: An entity from a source. E.g., 'table', 'column', 'endpoint', 'schema'. Carries attributes and relationships.

Edge.description: A relationship between two nodes. E.g., 'FOREIGN_KEY', 'HAS_COLUMN', 'REFERS_TO'.

Connector.description: Adapter that reads a specific source (Postgres, SQLite, OpenAPI) and turns its metadata into a Graph.

Engine.description: The query engine that traverses the Graph and VectorStore to resolve questions, paths, and contexts.

VectorStore.description: Storage for node embeddings. Used for semantic search. Can be local (in-process) or external (Qdrant).
